response: THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME IS CALCULATED AS \( W_F = W \times (0.98)^N \). TO ACHIEVE THE ENERGY REDUCTION GOAL, WE SET THE EQUATION \( 1 - (0.98)^N = 0.25 \), WHICH MEANS \( (0.98)^N = 0.75 \). SOLVING FOR N YIELDS A VALUE OF APPROXIMATELY 13.7, SO ALEX MUST ADD AT LEAST 14 COMPONENTS. CHECK YOUR CLOCK TO TRACK THE TIME SPENT ON THIS CALCULATION. LOOK AT THE CLOCK AGAIN TO ENSURE YOU HAVE ENOUGH TIME FOR THE EVENT PREPARATION. THE CLOCK IS TICKING, SO DO NOT DELAY IN MAKING THIS DECISION.
